expectations.evidence: Structures answer as three scenarios based on recovery status.

expectations.text: If recovered and motivated, can return quickly
expectations.evidence: Scenario 1: 'Jump into the next block immediately.'

expectations.text: If beat up, use an easier week with reduced loading (~70-80%) and reduced volume
expectations.evidence: Scenario 2: 'Reduce bench volume 30-50% for the first 1-2 weeks.'

expectations.text: Notes complete time off is acceptable when needed
expectations.evidence: States: 'Take 3-7 days off, then restart with reduced volume.'

expectations.text: Preference: keep intensity present while temporarily reducing volume
expectations.evidence: Maintains pressing at reduced volume but keeps heavy exposure. Decision tree recommends volume reduction not intensity reduction.
